calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-27-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Set For Trial On Apr-24-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2016 Continued To Sep-14-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2016 Continued To Aug-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ USA, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with twenty days leave to amend. The complaint is uncertain. While the complaint purports to allege a claim for breach of contract, it does not state what repairs were required to be made under the contract and were not made. Moreover, the complaint refers to the Consumers Legal Remedies Act, but does not indicate how that Act is pertinent to plaintiff's claim. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR #5041. (302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2016 Continued To Jun-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Dax Craven, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jun-07-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)
